metadata.title: Train Smarter
metadata.description: Professional training management platform for coaches and athletes

ds.title: Train Smarter — Design System
ds.subtitle: PROJ-1: Design System Foundation. All tokens, colors, typography, and components at a glance.
ds.darkModeTip: Tip: Toggle dark mode to see the Warm-Slate dark surfaces.

comp.title: Train Smarter — Component Library
comp.subtitle: PROJ-2: UI Component Library. All extended components at a glance.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.welcome: Welcome back! Here is your overview.
dashboard.nextSessionsDesc: Scheduled sessions for today and tomorrow

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to continue
login.emailNotConfirmed: Please confirm your email address first.
login.genericError: An error occurred. Please try again.
login.networkError: Connection failed. Please check your internet connection.

register.title: Create account
register.subtitle: Create your free Train Smarter account
register.success: Registration successful! Please check your inbox.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email address and we'll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.successMessage: If an account with this email exists, you will receive a password reset link.
forgotPassword.genericError: An error occurred. Please try again.

resetPassword.title: Set new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter your new password.
resetPassword.success: Password successfully reset. Redirecting to login.
resetPassword.genericError: An error occurred. Please try again.
resetPassword.processingSubtitle: Please wait while your link is being verified.

verifyEmail.title: Verify your email
verifyEmail.subtitle: We've sent a confirmation email to {email}.
verifyEmail.subtitleNoEmail: We've sent you a confirmation email.
verifyEmail.instruction: Click the link in the email to activate your account.
verifyEmail.resendError: Could not resend email. Please try again later.
verifyEmail.rateLimited: Please wait a moment before requesting another email.

callback.linkExpired: This link has expired. Please request a new one.
callback.genericError: An error occurred. Please try again.

wizard.title: Welcome to Train Smarter
wizard.subtitle: Let's set up your account. This will only take a moment.

step1.title: Privacy & Consent
step1.subtitle: Before you get started, we need your consent.
step1.bodyDataOptional: I allow the processing of my body data (weight, height, body composition).
step1.nutritionOptional: I allow the processing of my nutrition diary.
step1.requiredConsent: You must accept the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy to continue.

step2.title: Your Profile
step2.subtitle: Tell us a bit about yourself.
step2.avatarTooLarge: File is too large. Maximum 5 MB.
step2.avatarInvalidType: Invalid file type. Allowed: JPEG, PNG, WebP.

step3.title: Your Role
step3.subtitle: How do you want to use Train Smarter?
step3.trainerDesc: I coach athletes, create training plans, and track their progress.
step3.athleteDesc: I follow my coach's training plans and track my progress.
step3.roleSaveError: Could not save role. Please try again.

step4.trainerSubtitle: Invite your first athlete via email. You can also skip this step.
step4.athleteSubtitle: Do you have an invitation code from your coach? You can also skip this step.
